CustomField.formula: IF(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', "Account", "") + IF(AND(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", Course", "") + IF(AND(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", Session", "") + IF(AND(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", PCE", "") + IF(AND(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', NOT(Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", PCE", "") + IF(AND(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", Session", "") + IF(AND(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", PCE", "") + IF(AND(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), NOT(Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", PCE", "") + IF(AND(NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), "Course", "") + IF(AND(NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", Session", "") + IF(AND(NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", PCE", "") + IF(AND(NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', NOT(Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", PCE", "") + IF(AND(NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), "Session", "") + IF(AND(NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked', Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), ", PCE", "") + IF(AND(NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Account__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), NOT(Session__r.Course__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), NOT(Session__r.Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), Current_Active_Action_Status__c == 'Revoked'), "PCE", "")
CustomField.label: Revoked From
